title: CobbleDex Rewards
description: A mod created for the PokeFactory Reborn DoD Server by DiamonDoughnut - Rewards and benefits for completing regions of the Pokedex
body:
A Mod created for the DoD PokeFactory Reborn server by DiamonDoughnut. No items in this are craftable, they are designed to be given out either as automatic rewards or by server staff in response to player achievment and denote that player's completion of the pokedex available within the mod being played. Will work for both Cobblemon and Pixelmon eventually, but as it isn't ported to Forge yet, Cobblemon is the only current option. No dependencies, so technically it can be repurposed for a non-Cobblemon Modpack as well. 

Currently the Map block is unbreakable outside of Creative mode, but all ribbons and stamps will be returned when the block is broken. 

This is an alpha release, so things will be broken/incomplete - please list any bugs/issues on the github issues page linked here.
